lines.english: Why is fishing the writer's favourite sport?
lines.chinese: 为什么钓鱼是作者最喜欢的运动？
lines.raw: Why is fishing the writer's favourite sport? | 为什么钓鱼是作者最喜欢的运动？

lines.chinese: 钓鱼是我最喜欢的运动。
lines.raw: Fishing is my favourite sport. | 钓鱼是我最喜欢的运动。

lines.english: I often fish for hours without catching anything.
lines.chinese: 我经常钓好几个小时，却什么也钓不到。
lines.raw: I often fish for hours without catching anything. | 我经常钓好几个小时，却什么也钓不到。

lines.english: But this does not worry me.
lines.raw: But this does not worry me. | 但这并不困扰我。
Some fishermen are unlucky. | 有些渔夫运气不好。
Instead of catching fish, | 他们不是钓到鱼，

lines.english: they catch old boots and rubbish.
lines.chinese: 而是钓到旧靴子和垃圾。
lines.raw: they catch old boots and rubbish. | 而是钓到旧靴子和垃圾。
I am even less lucky. | 我甚至更不走运。

lines.english: I never catch anything -- not even old boots.
lines.chinese: 我什么也钓不到——甚至连旧靴子都钓不到。
lines.raw: I never catch anything -- not even old boots. | 我什么也钓不到——甚至连旧靴子都钓不到。

lines.english: After having spent whole mornings on the river,
lines.chinese: 在河上度过整个上午之后，
lines.raw: After having spent whole mornings on the river, | 在河上度过整个上午之后，

lines.english: I always go home with an empty bag.
lines.raw: I always go home with an empty bag. | 我总是空手回家。

lines.english: 'You must give up fishing!' my friends say. 'It's a waste of time.'
lines.chinese: “你必须放弃钓鱼！”我的朋友们说，“这简直是浪费时间。”
lines.raw: 'You must give up fishing!' my friends say. 'It's a waste of time.' | “你必须放弃钓鱼！”我的朋友们说，“这简直是浪费时间。”

lines.english: But they don't realize one important thing.
lines.chinese: 但他们没有意识到一件重要的事情。
lines.raw: But they don't realize one important thing. | 但他们没有意识到一件重要的事情。

lines.english: I'm not really interested in fishing.
lines.chinese: 我对钓鱼并不真正感兴趣。
lines.raw: I'm not really interested in fishing. | 我对钓鱼并不真正感兴趣。

lines.english: I am only interested in sitting in a boat and doing nothing at all!
lines.chinese: 我只对坐在船上什么也不做感兴趣！
lines.raw: I am only interested in sitting in a boat and doing nothing at all! | 我只对坐在船上什么也不做感兴趣！
